## Summary

Describe the requested change and the implemented outcome.

## Motivation

Explain why this change is needed for the finance dashboard lab or application.

## Change Type

- [ ] Initial application delivery
- [ ] Dashboard enhancement
- [ ] Data integration update
- [ ] Test / validation improvement

## Bob Collaboration Notes

- repository analysis
- implementation
- validation
- diff review
- PR description generation

## Validation

List the commands or checks used to validate the change.

```bash
npm install
npm test
npm run build
```

## Feature Request Alignment

If this PR addresses a GitHub issue or enhancement request, explain:
- requested behavior
- acceptance criteria
- how the implementation satisfies the request

## Screenshots / Demo Notes

Add screenshots, short recordings, or demo notes if relevant.

## Risks / Follow-Up

List known limitations, future improvements, or follow-up items.
